full_text:
Yang Zhong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Zhong. Officer killed by the rebelling forces of Zhang Chun and his allies. Yang Zhong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Yang Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
